response:
It's natural to feel insignificant at times. The path can feel long and uncertain.  
Many people share similar thoughts. The path is often unclear.  
Life can make one feel small. The path seems endless.  
But remember, your existence matters. The path is unique.  
You are part of something greater. The path leads forward.  
Even the smallest steps count. The path is yours.  
You are not alone in this feeling. The path is shared.  
Every person has their own path. The path is yours.  
Don’t let doubt define your worth. The path is yours.  
You have the power to shape your path. The path is yours.
